items.description:
A single deployment definition as written in `config.yaml`.
One deployment maps to one cloud region/provider combination and owns
a set of named services.

deployment_name.description: Unique identifier for this deployment. Used in CLI `--target` flags and state files.
deployment_name.title: deployment_name

duplicate_deployment_name.description:
When set, this deployment is treated as a copy of the named deployment.
All services and settings are inherited and can be overridden.
duplicate_deployment_name.title: duplicate_deployment_name

env.description: Environment variables injected into every service in this deployment.
env.title: env

env_file.description: Path to a `.env` file whose contents are injected into every service.
env_file.title: env_file

location.description: Provider-specific datacenter/region slug, e.g. `"ash"` for Hetzner Ashburn.
location.title: location

pre_deployment.description: Commands run once on the relay server before any service setup begins.

file.description: Path to a shell script file on the target server to execute instead of `cmds`.
file.title: file

work_dir.description: Working directory for the commands or script.
work_dir.title: work_dir

pre_deployment.title: pre_deployment

relay_server_options.description: Options for the relay server provisioned for each deployment.

server_type.description: Override the default relay server hardware type (e.g. `"cx22"` on Hetzner).
server_type.title: server_type

relay_server_options.title: relay_server_options

additionalProperties.description:
Configuration for a single named service within a deployment.
A service represents one logical tier (e.g. `web`, `api`, `lb`).
The `type` field selects the deployment path; all other fields are
interpreted in the context of that type.

allow_ips.description:
Restrict inbound requests to these IPs/CIDRs only. All other IPs are
denied. Applies to all server blocks on this load balancer.

Accepts raw IPs/CIDRs or named providers which are automatically
expanded to their published ranges. Supported providers: "cloudflare".

Example: ["cloudflare", "5.78.1.245"]

Only applies to `load_balancer` services.
allow_ips.title: allow_ips

clusters.description:
Number of server clusters. During rolling updates, clusters are
deployed one at a time for zero-downtime. Defaults to `1`.
clusters.title: clusters

dependencies.description:
Packages to install on provisioned servers before running flight scripts.
Use `apt` for system packages, `turboci` for managed runtimes (bun, node, docker).
dependencies.title: dependencies

dir_mappings.description: Local → remote directory mappings synced before each deployment.

items.description: A local → remote directory sync mapping used during the prepare phase.

dst.description: Absolute destination path on target servers.
dst.title: dst

ignore_file.description: Path to an rsync-style ignore file.
ignore_file.title: ignore_file

ignore_patterns.description: Explicit patterns to exclude from the sync.
ignore_patterns.title: ignore_patterns

relay_ignore.description: Patterns excluded only on the local → relay leg of the sync.
relay_ignore.title: relay_ignore

src.description: Local source path (relative to the `.turboci` directory).
src.title: src

use_gitignore.description: If `true`, applies the project's `.gitignore` as rsync exclude rules.
use_gitignore.title: use_gitignore

dir_mappings.title: dir_mappings

duplicate_service_name.description:
When set, this service is treated as a copy of the named service
within the same deployment.
duplicate_service_name.title: duplicate_service_name

enable_public_ip.description:
When `true`, servers for this service receive a public IP in addition to
their private IP. Defaults to `false` — servers are private-only and
accessed exclusively through the relay.
enable_public_ip.title: enable_public_ip

env.description: Environment variables injected into this service's servers.
env.title: env

env_file.description: Path to a `.env` file loaded into this service's environment.
env_file.title: env_file

anyOf.description: Configuration for pulling a git repository onto target servers.

api_key.description: API key or personal access token for private repo access.
api_key.title: api_key

host.description: Custom git host, used for self-hosted Gitea/Gitlab instances.
host.title: host

keep_updated.description:
If `true`, TurboCI continuously polls the repository and re-runs
the flight scripts whenever new commits are detected.
keep_updated.title: keep_updated

paradigm.description: Git hosting provider. Affects clone URL construction and auth.
paradigm.title: paradigm

public_repo.description: If `true`, clones without authentication (no deploy key required).
public_repo.title: public_repo

work_dir.description:
Absolute path on target servers where the repo is cloned.
Defaults to `/app`.
work_dir.title: work_dir

items.description: Configuration for pulling a git repository onto target servers.

api_key.description: API key or personal access token for private repo access.
api_key.title: api_key

host.description: Custom git host, used for self-hosted Gitea/Gitlab instances.
host.title: host

keep_updated.description:
If `true`, TurboCI continuously polls the repository and re-runs
the flight scripts whenever new commits are detected.
keep_updated.title: keep_updated

paradigm.description: Git hosting provider. Affects clone URL construction and auth.
paradigm.title: paradigm

public_repo.description: If `true`, clones without authentication (no deploy key required).
public_repo.title: public_repo

work_dir.description:
Absolute path on target servers where the repo is cloned.
Defaults to `/app`.
work_dir.title: work_dir

git.description: Git repository source(s) to clone/pull onto target servers.
git.title: git

healthcheck.description: Healthcheck run after the service starts to verify it is live.
healthcheck.title: healthcheck

init.description: Shell commands run once on first deploy (not on re-deploys).
init.title: init

instances.description: Number of servers to provision per cluster. Defaults to `1`.
instances.title: instances

logs.description:
Commands or log sources tailed when `turboci control` streams logs
for this service.
logs.title: logs

os.description: OS image slug to use when creating servers for this service.
os.title: os

run.description: Preflight, start, and postflight shell scripts for this service.

postflight.description: Commands run after the service starts (smoke tests, cache warm-up, etc.).

file.description: Path to a shell script file on the target server to execute instead of `cmds`.
file.title: file

work_dir.description: Working directory for the commands or script.
work_dir.title: work_dir

postflight.title: postflight

preflight.description: Commands run before the service starts (install deps, migrations, etc.).

file.description: Path to a shell script file on the target server to execute instead of `cmds`.
file.title: file

work_dir.description: Working directory for the commands or script.
work_dir.title: work_dir

preflight.title: preflight

start.description: Commands that start the service process (must be non-blocking or daemonised).

file.description: Path to a shell script file on the target server to execute instead of `cmds`.
file.title: file

work_dir.description: Working directory for the commands or script.
work_dir.title: work_dir

start.title: start

work_dir.description: Default working directory for all scripts in this run block.
work_dir.title: work_dir

run.title: run

ssl.description: SSL/TLS configuration. Triggers Certbot certificate provisioning.
ssl.title: ssl

target_services.description:
Target services this load balancer proxies to.
Only used when `type` is `"load_balancer"`.

items.description:
A single upstream target for a load balancer service.
Each target maps to one NGINX `upstream` block and one `server` block.

backup.description: If `true`, this target is used as a fallback when all primary servers are down.
backup.title: backup

domains.description:
Domains to attach to this target's server block. Triggers TLS termination
when `ssl` is configured on the parent service. Accepts plain strings or
`TCIConfigServiceDomain` objects.

anyOf.description: An explicitly named domain, used as an alternative to a plain domain string.

domains.title: domains

locations.description:
Custom NGINX `location` blocks rendered inside this target's server block.
The default `location /` proxy block is auto-generated unless a `"/"` path
is explicitly defined here.

items.description:
A custom NGINX `location` block rendered inside a load balancer server block.
By default each location proxies to the upstream; set `proxy: false` for
locations that should be handled locally (static files, redirects, etc.).

directives.description:
Arbitrary NGINX directives added verbatim inside this location block.
String values emit a single directive; array values emit one line per entry.

Example:
```yaml
directives:
  root: /var/www/html
  add_header:
    - "Cache-Control 'public'"
    - "X-Frame-Options DENY"
```
directives.title: directives

match.description:
NGINX location path or pattern.
Supports all NGINX matching prefixes: `"/"`, `"/api/"`, `"= /ping"`,
`"~* \\.(jpg|png)$"`, etc.
match.title: match

no_proxy.description:
If `true`, the upstream `proxy_pass` block is omitted for this location.
Use when serving static files, issuing redirects, or returning custom
responses. Defaults to `false`.
no_proxy.title: no_proxy

rate_limit.description: Rate limiting applied to this location.

burst.description: Burst queue size — requests exceeding the rate are queued up to this limit.
burst.title: burst

key.description:
NGINX rate limit key. Defaults to `"$binary_remote_addr"` (per client IP).
Can be any NGINX variable, e.g. `"$http_x_forwarded_for"`.
key.title: key

nodelay.description: If `true`, burst requests are served immediately rather than delayed.
nodelay.title: nodelay

rate_limit.title: rate_limit

target_path.description:
Path to target on the upstream. If left empty, the default path
will be used.
target_path.title: target_path

target_port.description:
Port on the target upstream to target. Default port is the one
set on the parent `target_services` onject.
target_port.title: target_port

locations.title: locations

port.description: Port the target service listens on.
port.title: port

service_name.description: Name of the service in the same deployment to proxy traffic to.
service_name.title: service_name

target_location.description: Custom NGINX `location` block added to the base("/") location

directives.description:
Arbitrary NGINX directives added verbatim inside this location block.
String values emit a single directive; array values emit one line per entry.

Example:
```yaml
directives:
  root: /var/www/html
  add_header:
    - "Cache-Control 'public'"
    - "X-Frame-Options DENY"
```
directives.title: directives

match.description:
NGINX location path or pattern.
Supports all NGINX matching prefixes: `"/"`, `"/api/"`, `"= /ping"`,
`"~* \\.(jpg|png)$"`, etc.
match.title: match

no_proxy.description:
If `true`, the upstream `proxy_pass` block is omitted for this location.
Use when serving static files, issuing redirects, or returning custom
responses. Defaults to `false`.
no_proxy.title: no_proxy

rate_limit.description: Rate limiting applied to this location.

burst.description: Burst queue size — requests exceeding the rate are queued up to this limit.
burst.title: burst

key.description:
NGINX rate limit key. Defaults to `"$binary_remote_addr"` (per client IP).
Can be any NGINX variable, e.g. `"$http_x_forwarded_for"`.
key.title: key

nodelay.description: If `true`, burst requests are served immediately rather than delayed.
nodelay.title: nodelay

rate_limit.title: rate_limit

target_path.description:
Path to target on the upstream. If left empty, the default path
will be used.
target_path.title: target_path

target_port.description:
Port on the target upstream to target. Default port is the one
set on the parent `target_services` onject.
target_port.title: target_port

target_location.title: target_location

weight.description: NGINX upstream weight for weighted round-robin load distribution.
weight.title: weight

target_services.title: target_services

services.description: Map of service name → service config. Key becomes the service identifier.
services.title: services

an object with an explicit `cmd` key.
TCIConfigServiceConfigLog.title: TCIConfigServiceConfigLog
